Simregr 0.1

  • Changelog

Linear Regression

lin.regr.Rd

Function takes two vectors of the same length and calculates the best-fit linear function using Method of Least Squares.

Usage

lin.regr(x, y, na.rm = FALSE)

Arguments

x

numeric vector

y

numeric vector

na.rm

logical vector of length 1

Value

Returns a numeric vector with two elements, the first one is slope of the linear function which is best-fit for the data given, and the second value is the y-intercept.

Examples

lin.regr(1:10, 11:20)
#> [1]  1 10
x <- seq(0, pi, pi/16)
lin.regr(x, sin(x))
#> [1] -2.125746e-16  5.972453e-01
